tool_of_day.title: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems
tool_of_day.summary: RIFT-Bench is a dynamic red-teaming framework for agentic AI systems.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible AI practices, with a focus on explainability and transparency, as seen in the recent launch of OpenAI's Jalapeño processor and the development of frameworks like RIFT-Bench.
